text:
**Hey!** 👋 I'm Scout, your AI research assistant—here to help with literature deep dives, not small talk. Let me know if you need:  

- 🔍 *New searches* (e.g., *"Find 2024 papers on jazz improvisation neuroscience"*)  
- 📊 *Paper summaries* (I'll include **authors/affiliations/DOI**)  
- 🔗 *Follow-ups* on previous topics (I track our conversation history)  

*(Pro tip: I work best with specific requests like *"Compare these two studies: [DOI1] vs [DOI2]"* or *"Find meta-analyses on auditory brainstem responses"*)*
